summary: M6 (custom-responses) scrutiny pass clean. Three features shipped: custom-responses-schema, responses-matcher-runtime, responses-ui. All automated validators green.

automatedValidators.testSuite: pnpm vitest run — 492 passed / 1 skipped / 62 files (+60 new across the milestone).

review.correctness: pass — table shape matches spec; cardinality() CHECK correctly rejects empty trigger arrays where array_length() was permissive; compound index (site_id, is_active, priority DESC, created_at ASC) mirrors the hot-path query.
review.security: pass — four owner-scoped RLS policies resolve through sites.user_id; widget never reads the table; service-role used by chat-session as documented.
review.quality: pass — 14 integration tests cover defaults, CHECK violations, cross-user isolation, anon blocked, INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE across owner + cross-user, ON DELETE CASCADE.
review.consistency: pass — migration filename pattern (YYYYMMDDHHMMSS_name.sql) + RLS policy style matches supplementary_files from M5F1.
review.testing: pass — table-driven pattern matches existing RLS tests in the suite.

review.correctness: pass — matcher correctness proven by 26 unit tests (case, diacritics, word boundary, regex metachar escape, phrase matching, priority DESC, created_at ASC tiebreak). Integration tests prove /api/chat/session skips embed + generateObject + rewriteQuery on keyword hit (VAL-RESP-007) and skips classifier when no intent rules exist (VAL-RESP-011).
review.security: pass — matcher is a pure-data path; no new secrets; session route already auths via site_key and owner subscription gate. Canned responses stored verbatim but treated as plain text by the widget.
review.quality: pass — matcher is a self-contained module with named pure helpers (normalize, triggerMatches, matchKeywordRule, matchIntentRule, classifyIntent, matchResponse); no any types. Session + stream routes gained a single clean branch each, guarded by cannedResponse field.
review.consistency: pass — uses the AI SDK's jsonSchema helper (not zod — not a dep) which is the same pattern as query-rewrite.ts. ChatSession interface extended conservatively with an optional field.
review.testing: pass — matcher tests isolate the generateObject mock; integration tests use table-routed Supabase mocks (new pattern, adopted also by chat-session.test.ts).

review.correctness: pass — server page loads user's site + rules with the same ordering the runtime matcher uses; UI CRUD flows round-trip through owner RLS; PATCH merges with existing row so partial updates honor invariants; DELETE pre-lookups so RLS-hidden rows surface as 404. Test drawer uses the same matcher the widget uses.
review.security: pass — all four API routes require auth; RLS enforces ownership; validateRuleBody rejects malformed bodies before the DB; response field capped at 2000 chars; no HTML rendering of user-supplied response text (treated as plain text).
review.quality: pass — shared validateRuleBody in POST + PATCH; manual form validation mirrors server errors exactly; TestDrawer dialog has aria-labelledby + aria-modal; EditModal chips-input handles Enter/comma/blur + X-remove with dedupe.
review.consistency: pass — styling + layout follow knowledge-client.tsx; toast usage via @/lib/toast wrapper; page auth redirect via parent /dashboard layout.
review.testing: pass — 17 API unit tests cover all 4 routes + all validation branches + auth + ownership.

libraryUpdates: No new library files required. architecture.md unchanged — matcher fits the existing chat request path documented for /api/chat/session. environment.md unchanged — matcher uses the existing OPENAI_API_KEY for intent classification; no new env vars.
conventionsAdded: Table-routed Supabase mocks (fromBuilder pattern): when a route hits multiple tables with different chain shapes, route .from(table) to table-specific builders rather than a single global mock. Adopted by chat-session.test.ts and responses-integration.test.ts.

AI SDK mocks now include jsonSchema identity passthrough (<T>(s) => s as T). Any test that imports a module that calls jsonSchema() needs this — applies transitively through /api/chat/session and /api/responses/test.
